description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master, except those with a checkvalgrind prefix. The workflow should run unit tests in a ubuntu-22.04 environment with a MongoDB service. It checks out the code, then runs unit tests in a Docker container using the telefonicaiot/fiware-orion:ci image, mounting the current directory and passing a repository access token as an environment variable.
